sources: Alpha Vantage API (free tier: $5/request, daily/intraday data)
TradingView charts (manual technical analysis per SPDF framework)

technical_analysis_framework.name: SPDF - Saxena Portfolio Decision Framework

layers.Layer1_Trend: 50/200-day SMAs, above both = uptrend (favor dips), below both = avoid
layers.Layer2_Momentum: RSI(14): <35 in uptrend = buy zone, >70 = trim zone; MACD crossover
layers.Layer3_Volume: Buy signal requires volume >1.3x 20-day avg; trim needs RSI >70 only
layers.Layer4_Volatility: ATR(14) for stop-loss distance and position sizing (signal layer)

rules: Buy fires only if Layers 1+2+3 align
All sells require re-entry price and catalyst scan
Always check catalysts before recommending exit

MSFT.trim_signal: Bounce to $430-440, proceeds to GOOGL build and dry powder

GOOGL.build_signal: SPDF uptrend confirmation, target meaningful second pillar

IONQ.re_entry: $50 or below with volume, suggest 50-75 shares

SPCE.hold_thesis: Delta Class trials Q3-Q4 2026, thesis hold on weakness

SPCX.post_ipo_entry: 2-4 weeks post IPO (June 12 IPO), expect temp dips during rebalance

tax_considerations.rnor_window: FY2025-26 and FY2026-27: foreign gains NOT taxable in India
tax_considerations.strategy: Use proactively for rebalancing, not passively
tax_considerations.post_rnor: Shift to Ireland-domiciled ETFs (VUAA.L template) for long-term sit-and-forget
